summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Catalog Designer feature. All 10 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed: Setup page loads with company name input, template selector (Classic/Modern/Minimal), page count selector (4/8/12), color/font pickers. Editor transitions correctly with 3-panel layout (left thumbnails, center A4 preview, right controls). Cover/Product/Gallery/Text/BackCover page types all work. Page type switching, add/remove pages, quantity controls, and pricing tiers all functional. Add to cart navigates to /varukorg with correct 'Egen design' badge showing page count and template. B2B /foretag page has working design/upload toggle for catalogs.
critical_code_review_comments: CatalogDesigner.js: Well-structured component with clear separation of setup and editor states
CatalogDesigner.js: PagePreview component correctly renders all 5 page types (cover, product, gallery, text, backcover)
CatalogDesigner.js: Price tiers correctly implemented (89/69/49/39 kr based on quantity)
CatalogDesigner.js: Virtual product ID 'print-catalog-custom' correctly used for cart integration
BusinessCatalog.js: Design/Upload toggle (catalogSource state) correctly switches between designer CTA and PDF upload
CartItemCard.js: catalog_design customization type correctly renders 'Egen design' badge with page count and template
useCartData.js: Virtual product detection (isVirtual) correctly handles 'print-catalog-custom' prefix
App.js: /katalog-designer route correctly configured as standalone (no navbar/footer)
seed_data_creation: Created test catalog design items during testing via cart API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Catalog Designer feature fully tested. Virtual product ID: 'print-catalog-custom'. Customization type: 'catalog_design'. Cart badge shows 'Egen design — {page_count} sidor, {template}'. B2B page at /foretag has design/upload toggle for catalog service. Designer is standalone page at /katalog-designer (no navbar/footer). Price tiers: 1-9 ex = 89 kr, 10-24 ex = 69 kr, 25-49 ex = 49 kr, 50+ ex = 39 kr.

Editor (3-panel layout).Left sidebar - page thumbnails: ✓ Shows all pages with type labels

Page Types.Product page: ✓ Product items with image, name, desc, price
Page Types.Back cover: ✓ Company name, phone, email, website, address

B2B Page (/foretag).PDF upload: ✓ Upload area shown when 'Ladda upp PDF' selected

mocked_apis.note: Stripe checkout and Klarna/Swish are MOCKED as per previous iterations
